company_termination_fee.notes: Payable by the Company following termination to accept a Superior Proposal and under certain other circumstances.

offer_price_per_share.amount_text: $26.45 in cash plus 1.0340 JHX shares per share of Company Common Stock

notes: Outside date is March 23, 2026 (12 months), subject to automatic 3-month extension under certain circumstances. Merger consideration is $26.45 cash plus 1.0340 JHX shares per Company share. No reverse termination fee or regulatory termination fee explicitly mentioned in the 8-K.
